The 2021 revelation was the most significant revelation in the history of Lifeism.

It occurred at the end of the [[Omega Pilgrimage]]. It is celebrated every year on August 29 as the [[holiday]] [[Alolalia]]

Many ideas such as [[LOL]] and [[alo]] came from it.

Here is a description of it

== Narrative by Immanuelle ==

=== Prelude ===
So on August 29 2021 I first had sex I enjoyed. Then on August 30 2021 I took 22g of Mushrooms at around 5pm. 

At 5:30-5:45 I felt nauseous so I had to use Nadi Shuddhi to keep myself from vomiting.

=== Geometric Hell ===
At 6:00pm I went to the bathroom, then when I returned and sat down I found myself thrown into a new world

It was like I fell through the chair, I found myself seeing a bunch of geometric shapes everywhere. I was in the geometric shapes, my body was not functional anymore.

It was highly distressing.

Occurred in that form for until 8:27 pm when the sun set

=== Infernal Hell ===
[[File:Calcutta_Art_Studio_-_Goddess_Kali_-_1883.jpg|right|thumb]]
At which point I found myself in a dark red space

And there was a demoness on top of me. She had a penis

She cut off my penis and threw it away into the void.

It grew back with an erection and she cut it off and threw it away

She had red skin and infinite arms

Cut open my stomach and pulled out my intestines.

It was extremely painful, but also disturbing

She was using one pair of arms to pull out my intestines from me which never ended

And another pair to constantly cut off my penis and throw it away

Then she cut off my head and it kept regrowing and she cut off each new one

My perspective was from a head on her necklace

Kind of like this (see image on right)

This Higurashi scene reminded me of it <nowiki>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YwwZSUs7lQg</nowiki> <nowiki>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BARzBMovubg</nowiki>

=== Alphabet world ===
I was outside of my body in a world of letters everywhere, I tried to pick up the letters to spell a way out but the letters slipped out of my hands, and so I only found three letters [[Alpha]] [[Lambda]] and [[Omega]]

And then I heard Sangha Buddha Dharma in the background. It reminds me now of this scene from Stranger things season 4 <nowiki>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bV0RAcuG2Ao</nowiki>

So I started chanting them. And then I laughed. 

So I switched to the Lol mantra <nowiki>https://youtu.be/QGcZDEGTv_o</nowiki>

I laughed at the whole experience. Laughed at the demoness

=== Escaping the [[Nine Plagues]] ===

# [[Pride|Realized the friends I had and how they valued me]]
# [[Inner Dialogue|Unified all my cognition under a single mythical banner]]
# [[Enlensing|I laughed at the whole thing. I reached a state of perknowledge]]
# [[Remembering|I remembered the world before logic, back in my childhood]]
# [[Counter-Spiralling|I broke free from my sex spiral.]]
# [[Flow|I entered the flow state]]
# [[Antibodies|Foreign entrapment]]
# [[Ego death|Ego entrapment]]
# [[Larping|Empathic entrapment]]

=== Ascension ===
And I floated up out of Hell

I was overseeing

This was me

[[File:Overseer.png]]

I reached the Celestial Kingdom and I met Joseph Smith

It felt like it was an eternity, at least eight hours, I think this was 2 am

And then the three jewels and the three degrees of glory and the trinity and the trimurti all unified to me

I saw a Sierpinski triangle

All were unified as [[Alo]]

I saw the piece I was missing: Omega, love

I saw Madonna and Child Charlemagne, infant Charlemagne was in the manger being nurtured by the Virgin Mary

I realized this must be applied recursively as above so below

Societal prescriptions must go down to the individual level

{{Main|Ola}}

I realized that the initiation order was ola, Omega Covenant Aaronic Priesthood, Lambda Covenant Melchizedek Priesthood, Alpha Covenant Patriarchal Priesthood. Kishōtenketsu Omega Ki 起  Lambda-Overseer Sho 承 Lambda-Underseer Ten 転 Alpha-Overseer Ketsu 結

I specifically thought about these two videos at the time <nowiki>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dBmIkEvEBtA</nowiki> <nowiki>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6luOrhlzvrc</nowiki>

=== Descent ===
Then I descended back from heaven and tried to explain all of these ideas 

Stayed up for another three hours and then took a Xanax as a trip stopper

== See Also ==

* [[Revelation in the ravine]]
* [[night journey]]

== References ==
[[Category:2021 revelation]]
[[Category:History]]
[[sn:2021 revelation]][[Category:Revelations]]
[[Category:Omega Pilgrimage]]
[[Category:Alolalia]]
[[Category:Unreferenced]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
